summary: Frontend testing completed for TeacherHubPro homepage v5 update. All new features tested successfully: Google Classroom integration section with 'Connect with Your Favorite Platforms' title, Google Classroom card with green icon and 'INTEGRATED' badge, 3 features (Import classes, Sync grades, Secure & private), Coming Soon section with 5 platforms (Canvas LMS, Schoology, Microsoft Teams, Clever, ClassLink), Homeschool Educators section with parent-child image and 6 colored feature cards. Spanish translations verified. Mobile responsiveness at 390px width confirmed. Login functionality working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro homepage v5 update tested successfully. New Google Classroom integration section and Homeschool Educators section working correctly with all translations.
